titles.en: The Right of an Ill-Traveller upon his Travel Companions Is to Stay with him for Three Days
The Right of an Ill-Traveller upon his Travel Companions Is to Stay with him for Three Days

segments: : حق المسافر أن يقيم عليه أصحابه إذا مرض ثلاثا
arabic.text: : حق المسافر أن يقيم عليه أصحابه إذا مرض ثلاثا

segments: 3-49 Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Yahya al-Attar - may God be pleased with him - narrated that his father Muhammad ibn Yahya quoted Muhammad ibn Ahmad, on the authority of Yaqoob ibn Yazid, on the authority of some companions who linked up the tradition to the Prophet (MGB) having said, “The right of an ill traveler upon his travel companions is to stay with him for three days. ”
en.dr-ali-peiravi.text: 3-49 Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Yahya al-Attar - may God be pleased with him - narrated that his father Muhammad ibn Yahya quoted Muhammad ibn Ahmad, on the authority of Yaqoob ibn Yazid, on the authority of some companions who linked up the tradition to the Prophet (MGB) having said, “The right of an ill traveler upon his travel companions is to stay with him for three days. ”

narratorChain.raw: 3-49 حدثنا أحمد بن محمد بن يحيى العطار رضي الله عنه، عن أبيه محمد بن يحيى عن محمد بن أحمد، عن يعقوب بن يزيد، عن عدة من أصحابنا رفعوا الحديث قال

parts.text: أحمد بن محمد بن يحيى العطار رضي الله عنه،
عدة من أصحابنا رفعوا الحديث قال
